mentions.note: Could have first strong quarter in very long time; positive inflection point.
Down to $30 from highs; stock at crunch time; must deliver better-than-expected earnings at April 29 report to hold $30 support; wait for earnings catalyst.
Stock marking time around 34-35 but fundamentals turning; CEO Scott Boatwright doing everything right. Correlated to gasoline prices (inverse relationship) limits enthusiasm.
Down 40% from split price of $59; now at 30x earnings with positive script impact emerging; fundamentals better; want to buy here not sell; restaurant group out of favor on oil but recovery underway.
Turnaround gaining traction: protein menu resonates, four new LTOs in 2026, lower prices attract younger consumers, aggressive $1.8B buyback approved; feel of stores improving.
Stock so low it might bounce even if quarter isn't spectacular; may not matter but stock too low.
Down 40% last year, trading 34x earnings (historically higher); decent level to add position; could return to $30 lows for more buying before Feb 3 earnings.
